race.comment: STEIN (5) has been plying her trade in harder races in town and should appreciate the drop back in company here. Ready to peak now third-up from the spell and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. KATIE AINE (9) returned in fine fashion with a solid win around this circuit and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Winning rider Graham sticks in the saddle and can go back-to-back to start the campaign. FORTYSECONDSTREET (8) gets in well at the weights with the 3kg claim and will be rock-hard fit for this. Suitably placed against this line-up. The well-related MISS FUNNY HONEY (3) (half to G1 winner Vega One) wasn't disgraced in a much richer race last time out and maps nicely for this from gate four. In the mix. JARDIN DE LYS (11) next best from the low draw.
